nasb.text: Mourn for him, all you who live around him, Even all of you who know his name; Say, ‘How has the mighty scepter been broken, A staff of splendor!’

esv.text: Grieve for him, all you who are around him, and all who know his name; say, ‘How the mighty scepter is broken, the glorious staff.’

cnv.text: 所有在它四圍的， 所有認識它名的， 你們都要為它哀悼，說： ‘那有能力的權杖、 華美的杖竟然折斷了！’

ccb.text: 她的近邻和知道她名望的人啊， 你们都要为她哀悼， ‘那强大、辉煌的权势竟然崩溃了！’
